heading: Deposit and expenditure of use fees
label: 6235 Deposit and expenditure of use fees
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this Act”, which was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title V of div. F of , known as the National Forest Organizational Camp Fee Improvement Act of 2003, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 108–7

children.heading: Deposit and availability
children.label: a Deposit and availability
children.text: Unless subject to , use fees collected by the Secretary under this chapter shall be deposited in a special account in the Treasury and shall remain available to the Secretary for expenditure, without further appropriation until expended, for the purposes described in subsection (c).section 580d of this title

children.heading: Transfer
children.label: b Transfer
children.text: Upon request of the Secretary, the Secretary of the Treasury shall transfer to the Secretary from the special account such amounts as the Secretary may request. The Secretary shall accept and use such amounts in accordance with subsection (c).

children.heading: Use
children.label: c Use
children.text: Use fees deposited pursuant to subsection (a) and transferred to the Secretary under subsection (b) shall be expended for monitoring of Forest Service special use authorizations, administration of the Forest Service’s special program, interpretive programs, environmental analysis, environmental restoration, and similar purposes.
